title: Meta, NewsCorp in AI content licensing deal worth up to $50 million annually
description: Meta Platforms has agreed a multiyear AI content licensing deal with News Corp, reportedly worth up to $50 million annually. The three-year agreement allows Meta to use US and UK content for artificial-intelligence products and training. Chief executive Robert Thomson confirmed further negotiations are under way.

title: Sam Altman tells staff OpenAI has no say over Pentagon decisions
description: OpenAI chief executive Sam Altman told employees the company does not get to decide how the Department of Defense (DoD) uses its artificial intelligence software. He said the Pentagon will hear OpenAI’s expertise but will not allow it to make operational decisions, following tensions with Anthropic.
